title: Continue Hub Assistant
description: Schema for a Continue Hub assistant returned by the Continue Hub IDE API (api.continue.dev). Assistants are YAML-defined IDE configurations bundling models, rules, prompts, docs, MCP servers, and other context.

configResult.description: The unrolled assistant configuration plus loading status.

config.description: The unrolled assistant configuration (models, rules, prompts, docs, MCP servers, context providers).

errors.description: Errors that occurred during configuration loading.

ownerSlug.description: Slug of the user or organization that owns the assistant.

packageSlug.description: Slug of the assistant package on Continue Hub.

iconUrl.description: Pre-signed URL for the assistant's icon.

onPremProxyUrl.description: URL of the on-premises Continue proxy if the organization uses one.

useOnPremProxy.description: Whether the organization routes model traffic through an on-premises proxy.

rawYaml.description: Raw YAML configuration of the assistant as published to Continue Hub.
